title: K-200 Payload Risk Register
text:
# K-200 Payload Risk Register

Document number: MD-DOC-437-D. Revision: D. Type: analysis. Author: Jordan Kim. Created: 2023-12-04. Last modified: 2024-03-13. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Payload subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1035, P-1165, P-1174, P-1037.
